summary.headline: SEVERE / CRITICAL
summary.description: Five vectors are converging simultaneously: military multi-front expansion, financial warfare declaration, geopolitical credibility collapse, Third Temple acceleration, and theological convergence across all four traditions. New vector added: Information Warfare. Ramadan 1447 overlay active — Laylatul Qadr imminent. Watching for 90.

alert_tape: CRITICAL THRESHOLD APPROACHING — FINANCIAL WARFARE DECLARED — HORMUZ MINING CONFIRMED — MESSIAH DOCTRINE ACTIVE — LAYLATUL QADR THIS WEEK
changelog: Financial / Economic vector upgraded on bank-targeting language and Hormuz mining risk.
Information Warfare restored as a first-class vector with source metadata.
Interpretive and theological layers restored with doctrine, axis, and convergence sections.

intel_cards.title: Banks and financial institutions declared legitimate targets
intel_cards.summary: Iran's joint military command officially declared banks and financial institutions legitimate targets across the Middle East. Abraham Accords financial infrastructure is now explicitly in the crosshairs. Markets have not fully priced this.
intel_cards.analyst_note: This is a direct language shift, not just a sentiment read.

intel_cards.title: Hormuz effectively closed, mining confirmed
intel_cards.summary: A public lawmaker statement described the Strait as effectively closed for 10 days and said Iran is now mining the Strait. That puts roughly 20M barrels/day into the disruption frame with no clear public reopening plan.
intel_cards.analyst_note: This is one of the cleanest single triggers for a fast score jump toward 90.

intel_cards.title: CPI prints softer than the war narrative
intel_cards.summary: February CPI printed +0.3% MoM / +2.4% YoY. Core printed +0.2% MoM / +2.5% YoY — a slight dovish surprise on core, but the print is pre-war in market terms and the oil shock does not fully hit until later data windows.
intel_cards.analyst_note: Muted macro does not cancel energy shock risk.

intel_cards.title: Multi-front expansion remains active
intel_cards.summary: Hezbollah is opening a second front, IDF evacuation orders are expanding in south Lebanon, and the West Bank remains under full lockdown. The military picture is not a single-front event anymore.
intel_cards.analyst_note: The point is convergence — multiple fronts reinforcing one another.

doctrine.title: Netanyahu Messiah Doctrine — Fully Documented
doctrine.quote: "We will make it to the return of the Messiah, but this will not happen next Thursday."
doctrine.quote_source: — PRIME MINISTER BENJAMIN NETANYAHU // MARCH 12, 2026 // ACTIVE WARTIME STATEMENT

cards.text: The late Rebbe Schneerson told a young Netanyahu: "You will be the prime minister who passes the scepter to the Messiah." That prophecy is now circulating openly during active war.
Netanyahu is framed explicitly as an accelerationist — someone who could precipitate or force God's intervention in history. Kohanim recruitment and Temple-adjacent preparation magnify that frame.
Netanyahu has said on record that he has a sense of mission, historically and spiritually. Inside this model, that matters because elite self-understanding can affect state behavior.

The theological significance within the Islamic eschatological framework cannot be overstated. No Western analytical model is tracking this variable.

cards.text: ADL published a large bias report explicitly pushing AI companies to reshape answers on Israel. Claude, GPT, Gemini, and Llama all sit inside that pressure campaign.
ADL leadership testified before the Israeli Knesset and invoked a prior Mossad pager operation as a model for information warfare strategy.
Education programs, platform pressure, encyclopedia editing battles, and the social layer all operate as one narrative battlespace rather than isolated incidents.

Hormuz mining confirmed operational — tanker sunk or disabled, full closure triggered.
